summary.lv: Magnetiq Bank meklē BaaS & iBankas atbalsta speciālistu/-i, kurš nodrošinās Banking as a Service un interneta bankas produktu ikdienas atbalstu klientiem, risinās incidentus un ietekmēs produkta attīstību.
summary.en: Magnetiq Bank is looking for a BaaS & Internet Banking Support Specialist to provide daily support for their Banking as a Service and internet banking products, manage incidents, and contribute to product development.
